welcome:
📖 Welcome to Teleary!
 Your personal mood diary bot❤️

Send me any message — text, photo, video, or album — and I'll help you log it with a mood.

Commands:
/list — Browse your entries
/random — Get a random diary entry
/search <text> — Search your diary
/search_by_date <date> — Search by date (YYYY, YYYY-MM, YYYY-MM-DD)
/edit — Edit a past entry
/delete — Delete a past entry
/import YYYY-MM-DD — Import a past entry
/settings — Configure reminders, memory, mood & language
/stats — View your journaling stats
/cancel — Cancel current action
album_items_how_feeling: 📸 Album with {count} items received. How are you feeling?
edit_how_find: How would you like to find the entry to edit?
edit_enter_keyword: Enter a keyword to search for:
edit_enter_date: Enter a date (YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD):
edit_results_for:
🔍 {count} result(s) for "{query}"

Which entry do you want to edit?
edit_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD.
edit_entries_for:
📅 {count} entry(ies) for {date}

Which entry do you want to edit?
edit_which_entry: Which entry do you want to edit?
edit_new_text_prompt:
Current thought: {thought}

Send me the new text (or /skip to keep current, /cancel to abort):
del_how_find: How would you like to find the entry to delete?
del_enter_keyword: Enter a keyword to search for:
del_enter_date: Enter a date (YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD):
del_results_for:
🔍 {count} result(s) for "{query}"

Which entry do you want to delete?
del_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD.
del_entries_for:
📅 {count} entry(ies) for {date}

Which entry do you want to delete?
del_which_entry: Which entry do you want to delete?
import_usage:
Usage: /import YYYY-MM-DD [HHMM]
Accepts YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY/MM/DD, or YYYYMMDD.
Optional time: HHMM, HH:MM, HHMMSS, or HH:MM:SS.
Then send the text on the next line.
import_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY/MM/DD, or YYYYMMDD.
import_invalid_time: Invalid time format. Use HHMM or HHMMSS.
import_send_text: Send me the entry text (or /cancel to abort):
import_album_pick_mood: 📸 Album with {count} items. Pick a mood:
settings_remind_prompt:
Send reminder start and end hours, separated by a space.
Example: 9 21 (means 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM)
Hours are in your timezone (0-23).

/cancel to abort.
settings_memory_prompt:
Send the time for daily memory (HH:MM format).
Example: 09:00

/cancel to abort.
settings_invalid_two_numbers: Please send two numbers separated by a space (e.g., 9 21).
emoji_tap_prompt: Tap an emoji to edit its label, ✖ to remove, or ➕ to add a new one.
emoji_add_prompt:
Send me the emoji and its label, separated by a space.
Example: 🤩 Excited

/cancel to abort.
emoji_edit_prompt:
Current: {emoji} {label}

Send the new emoji and label, separated by a space.
Example: 🤩 Excited

/cancel to abort.
emoji_send_emoji_label:
Please send an emoji and a label separated by a space.
Example: 🤩 Excited
emoji_something_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again from /settings.
list_no_entries: No diary entries yet. Start writing by sending me a message! 📝
search_by_date_usage:
Usage: /search_by_date <date>

Formats: YYYY, YYYY-MM, YYYY-MM-DD
Examples: 2026, 2026-06, 2026-06-25
search_by_date_invalid: Invalid date pattern "{raw}". Use YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD.
reminder_pool: Hey, don't forget to write something down today!
How are you feeling? Take a moment to journal.
Your diary misses you. Write something!
A quick entry now = a memory later. Journal!
What's on your mind? Drop a note in your diary.
Even one line counts — write something today.
